case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. MARK BROUSSARD ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROUSSARD, MARK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 241 SIXTH STREET, #602B, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED DEC-14-2016, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BROUSSARD, MARK DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BROUSSARD, MARK
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED DEC-14-2016, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT BROUSSARD, MARK
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BROUSSARD, MARK
DECLARATION RE: OF AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $8.56 FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BROUSSARD, MARK
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BROUSSARD, MARK
